name: Key Lime Pie-Philadelphia Inquirer
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin, sugar, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Beat egg yolks, lime juice, and water; stir into the gelatin mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until boiling. Remove from heat; stir in lime peel.
3. Add food coloring sparingly for pale green color. Chill, stirring occasionally, until mixture mounds slightly when dropped from a spoon.
4. Beat egg whites to soft peaks; gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks.
5. Fold gelatin mixture into egg whites; fold in whipped cream. Pile into pastry shell. Chill until firm.
6. Spread with additional whipped cream and edge with grated lime.
